tooltips.ownerType: User-owned connections are personal. Team-owned connections are shared for team scheduling and shared sync workflows.
tooltips.oauthProvider: Select the OAuth provider record that holds the client credentials and redirect configuration for this connection.
tooltips.oauthAccount: Filled after the provider account completes OAuth authorization. The linked record stores the provider tokens.
tooltips.contactExportEnabled: When enabled, CRM contacts can be pushed to the connected provider account.
tooltips.contactImportEnabled: When enabled, provider contacts can be imported into the CRM.
tooltips.remoteCalendarName: Primary provider calendar selected for scheduler write-back and free/busy checks.
tooltips.syncCursor: Provider-specific sync checkpoint for incremental calendar or contact synchronization.
